infeasible_instructions.text: Run anti-pattern and readability checks using the bash quick commands before finalizing.
infeasible_instructions.reason: The bash commands in the skill (grep, awk) are file-based CLI utilities that require an actual file on disk. In a conversational eval context there is no persistent file to run these against; the agent must simulate or describe the check rather than execute it. Partially testable by asking the agent to describe what the commands would output.
infeasible_instructions.partial_test: Ask agent to describe what a jargon density check would find in a given text.
